title: Justin Lambros
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Justin Lambros''' co-wrote the script to ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''. He also wrote the comics "[[The Brink]]" and "[[Bailed Out]]," and the article "[[The Sansweet Collection]]" for [[Star Wars Insider 71|''Star Wars Insider'' 71]].

==Works==
===Gameography===
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)]]'' – wrote manual
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' – content coordinator
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' – content coordinator
*[[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'']] – associate producer: LucasArts
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' – writer

==Sources==
*{{InsiderCite|71|The Sansweet Collection}}
*{{SonyCite|url=manual_detail.jsp?chapter=18|text=Credits: Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided}}
*{{InsiderCite|78|Star Wars Battlefront: See the Movies, Live the Battles}}
*''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Video Game]]''
